label: Add Item to Cart
description: Adds a product item to a user's shopping cart.

business.summary: Adds an item to the user's cart. If the product already exists, quantities are accumulated. Storage backend is selected at startup (Redis, Spanner, AlloyDB, or in-memory).
rules: If the same product_id exists in the cart, quantities are added together
If no cart exists for the user, a new one is created
Cart data is keyed by user_id
preconditions: A valid AddItemRequest with user_id and CartItem is received
outcomes: Item is added to the cart

label: Get Cart
description: Retrieves a user's shopping cart contents.

business.summary: Returns the full contents of a user's cart. Returns an empty cart if no data exists for the user.
rules: Returns all items in the cart
Returns empty cart if none exists
preconditions: A valid GetCartRequest with user_id is received
outcomes: Cart with user_id and items is returned

label: Empty Cart
description: Removes all items from a user's cart.

business.summary: Clears all items from the user's cart. Idempotent — emptying an already empty cart succeeds.
preconditions: A valid EmptyCartRequest with user_id is received
